title: Enter the ATKV Crescendo talent competition, deadline is today
description: GARDEN ROUTE AND LITTLE KAROO NEWS - The...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE AND LITTLE KAROO NEWS - The ATKV Crescendo talent competition is now 50 years old.

Songwriters and performers in the Karoo and Garden Route are urged to make use of the opportunity to make themselves known and become part of the ATKV Crescendo 2025 family.

Enter today. The deadline is midnight tonight, Friday 12 July.

Welcome

Entrants of all languages and with acts in all genres are welcome. Rap artists, singers, musicians and more may enter. Entries this year include finalists chosen in last year's competition.

Participants for a special workshop on the 20 July will be chosen from the entries. The workshop will be hosted by "Die Hooflig", Whaden Johannes, Stef Kruger and Petronel Baard.

Information

To see more information and to enter, go to: https://www.crescendo.org.za/.

You can also email [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
